testcase.name: authenticate
testcase.failure:
[setup] › auth.setup.ts:5:6 › authenticate ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:3000/sign-in Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:3000/sign-in", waiting until "load"
8 | 9 | // Go to sign-in page > 10 | await page.goto("/sign-in", { timeout: 30000 }); | ^ 11 | console.log("📄 Navigated to sign-in page"); 12 | console.log("📄 Current URL:", page.url()); 13 | at C:\Projects\mangatrack\tests\auth.setup.ts:10:14

npx playwright show-trace ..\test-results\auth.setup.ts-authenticate-setup\trace.zip

testcase.name: Basic Functionality Tests › server is running and accessible
Basic Functionality Tests › homepage loads and shows sign in
Basic Functionality Tests › dashboard redirects to sign in when not authenticated
Basic Functionality Tests › protected routes redirect to sign-in when not authenticated
Dashboard Loading Tests › dashboard loads with user data
Dashboard Loading Tests › dashboard shows empty state when no bookmarks
Dashboard Loading Tests › dashboard navigation works
Example Tests › search page is accessible
